title: Crispy Savory Shungiku Pancake
description: A light and crispy savoury pancake featuring shungiku leaves, tempered chocolate for a touch of indulgence, and suitable for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: Mix shungiku with flour, ground almonds, and salt.
Add flax seed meal and olive oil to the mixture. Stir until just combined; avoid overmixing to keep pancakes light.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat. Add a splash of water and let it steam for 20 seconds before adding batter to test if hot enough (should sizzle).
Pour in about 1/4 cup per pancake, cook until golden brown on one side.
Flip and cook the other side, or place directly into a preheated oven at 200°C for about 3 minutes. Remove from heat immediately to avoid overcooking.
Serve with tempered chocolate drizzle and fresh shungiku leaves if desired.
